title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned that Claude is increasingly handling code generation, review, experimentation, and AI research tasks at the company, approaching early-stage recursive self-improvement. OpenAI has issued similar warnings about AI systems accelerating their own development cycles. The video argues this trend represents a shift where AI systems execute substantive work on building next-generation AI, with humans setting goals but machines performing execution.
